meaning: 滨松[日本本洲岛中南部城市]
examples: Hamamatsu Photonics gained 6.4% after it was added to the MSCI World Index, while Nidec rose 3.8% on news it will acquire U.S.-based Emerson Electric's motors and controls unit.
